title: Extend `jit validate` and gate-checker integration
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 9.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] jit validate [<id>] [--json] runs local and graph rules, whole-repo or single issue.
- [hard] Output reports rule name, severity, and message; non-zero exit on error findings.
- [hard] A gate can invoke validation via --checker-command "jit validate {issue} --json".
